title: Factory Layout Distance Optimizer
description: Calculates the total material handling distance and identifies optimization opportunities based on facility layout, flow intensity, and path efficiency. Aligns with ISO 9001, Lean Manufacturing, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Number of Departments
inputs.businessContext: Total distinct production or storage areas in the facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distinct production or storage areas in the facility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesisteki toplam farklı üretim veya depolama alanı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der verschiedenen Produktions- oder Lagerbereiche in der Anlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de zones distinctes de production ou de stockage dans l'installation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Áreas totales de producción o almacenamiento distintas en la instalación.

inputs.label: Flow Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
inputs.businessContext: Number of material movements between each pair of departments per day.

label_i18n.en: Flow Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
label_i18n.tr: Akış Yoğunluğu Matrisi (üçgen, satır başına virgülle ayrılmış)
label_i18n.fr: Matrice d'intensité des flux (triangulaire, séparée par des virgules par ligne)
label_i18n.es: Matriz de Intensidad de Flujo (triangular, separada por comas por fila)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of material movements between each pair of departments per day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir departman çifti arasında günlük malzeme hareketi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Materialbewegungen zwischen jedem Abteilungspaar pro Tag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mouvements de matériaux entre chaque paire de départements par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de movimientos de material entre cada par de departamentos por día.

inputs.label: Distance Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
inputs.businessContext: Current or proposed travel distances between department centroids.

label_i18n.tr: Mesafe Matrisi (üçgen, satır başına virgülle ayrılmış)
label_i18n.fr: Matrice des distances (triangulaire, séparée par des virgules par ligne)
label_i18n.es: Matriz de Distancias (triangular, separada por comas por fila)

businessContext_i18n.en: Current or proposed travel distances between department centroids.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Departman merkezleri arasındaki mevcut veya önerilen seyahat mesafeleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle oder geplante Transportentfernungen zwischen Abteilungsschwerpunkten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distances de déplacement actuelles ou proposées entre les centroïdes des départements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancias de desplazamiento actuales o propuestas entre los centroides de los departamentos.

inputs.label: Path Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of straight-line distance to actual travel path (1.0 = perfect straight line).

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of straight-line distance to actual travel path (1.0 = perfect straight line).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düz çizgi mesafesinin gerçek seyahat yoluna oranı (1.0 = mükemmel düz çizgi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der geradlinigen Entfernung zum tatsächlichen Transportweg (1,0 = perfekte gerade Linie).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport entre la distance en ligne droite et le chemin de déplacement réel (1,0 = ligne droite parfaite).
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre la distancia en línea recta y la ruta de desplazamiento real (1.0 = línea recta perfecta).

inputs.label: Layout Type
inputs.businessContext: Classification of the facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Classification of the facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis yerleşiminin standart endüstri mühendisliği sınıflandırmasına göre sınıflandırılması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Klassifizierung des Anlagenlayouts nach Standardtaxonomie des Industrial Engineering.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Classification de l'implantation selon la taxonomie standard du génie industriel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación de la distribución de la instalación según la taxonomía estándar de ingeniería industrial.

inputs.label: Use Weighted Distance (Flow × Distance)
inputs.businessContext: If true, the primary result is the sum of flow × distance; otherwise raw distance sum.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, the primary result is the sum of flow × distance; otherwise raw distance sum.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, birincil sonuç akış × mesafe toplamıdır; aksi halde ham mesafe toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, ist das primäre Ergebnis die Summe von Fluss × Entfernung; andernfalls die rohe Entfernungssumme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, le résultat principal est la somme des flux × distance ; sinon la somme brute des distances.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, el resultado principal es la suma de flujo × distancia; de lo contrario, suma de distancia bruta.

rules.message: Number of departments must match the dimensions of both matrices.
Both matrices must be symmetric (undirected flows/distances).
Path efficiency factor must be between 0.1 and 1.0.

thresholds.alert: Total weighted distance exceeds 50,000 meter-trips/day. Consider layout reconfiguration.
Path efficiency factor below 0.5 indicates significant travel waste. Review aisle and corridor design.
A single department pair has flow intensity > 1,000 trips/day. Investigate potential congestion.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
